result:
The NS-SEC occupational class variables have been successfully cleaned, harmonized, and saved as a single CSV file named 'cleaned_data.csv' in the 'data/output/' directory. The file contains the following variables:

- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- nssec17 (NS-SEC at age 17)
- nssec18 (NS-SEC at age 18)
- nssec19 (NS-SEC at age 19)
- nssec20 (NS-SEC at age 20)
- nssec25 (NS-SEC at age 25, with special derivation for full-time students)
- nssec32 (NS-SEC at age 32)

All variables follow the specified harmonization rules, including:
1. Missing value codes standardized to the scheme (-9 to -1)
2. Fractional codes collapsed to integer categories
3. Proper factor levels with explicit labels
4. Special derivation for full-time students at age 25

The output is ready for analysis and adheres to all specified requirements.
